expectations.text: Notebook includes README-style intro with Context, Objective, Method, Analysis structure, and Data sources
expectations.evidence: Found all README intro markers in notebook intro.

expectations.text: Notebook contains required numbered sections from Imports through Display
expectations.evidence: Found all required numbered sections from 1 through 8.

expectations.text: Validation section explicitly documents the no-join scenario and validates required columns plus PR-grain duplicates
expectations.evidence: Validation section mentions the no-join case, required columns, and duplicate or PR-grain checks.

expectations.text: Notebook preserves the expected Delta output table names from the source notebook
expectations.evidence: All expected Delta output table names are present.

expectations.text: Review notes use PT-BR checkpoint prompts, include the confirmation pattern, and include dataset rationale
expectations.evidence: Review notes are missing one of: PT-BR checkpoint prompts, the expected confirmation pattern, or dataset rationale.
